title: coordinator/mod: Coordinator exposes queue_mut publicly, breaking encapsulation invariants
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
solid
## Location
src/coordinator/mod.rs:69-73 (Coordinator::queue_mut)
## Violation
```rust
pub const fn queue_mut(&mut self) -> &mut TaskQueue {
    &mut self.queue
}
```

`pub` on a leak-the-inner-field accessor is the same anti-pattern as making the field itself `pub`. The doc acknowledges it should be `pub(crate)` but does not follow through. This blocks any future invariant the Coordinator might want to enforce, e.g. "you can't submit while dispatch is running"; Phase 2's dispatcher will either bypass the type entirely or duplicate the API.

## Mandated refactor
Change `pub` to `pub(crate)`. Add `pub fn submit(&mut self, task: Task) -> Result<TaskId, ...>` as the stable external API. Tests inside the crate continue to use `queue_mut`.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
